database_info.name: Turnstile & Gate Opener Selection Theory - Standards Based
database_info.purpose: Engineering design tool for turnstile and gate opener selection

1_turnstile_type_selection.principle: Turnstile type determines security level, throughput, and aesthetics

types.best_for: Construction sites, factories, attractions, stadiums, schools
types.note: Arms drop on fire alarm for evacuation

types.best_for: High-security: prisons, military, unmanned entrances, perimeter
Corporate lobbies, offices, commercial buildings, premium aesthetics
Metro stations, office buildings, high-traffic areas
Residential gates, compound entry, vehicle access

2_authentication_integration.principle: Turnstile integrates with access control for authentication before passage

methods.integration: Direct — card reader built into turnstile
Terminal mounted on turnstile via bracket → relay signal to turnstile
methods.wiring: Network cable to terminal + relay wire to turnstile

methods.integration: Third-party or separate Hikvision reader connected via Wiegand/RS-485 to controller → relay to turnstile
methods.best_for: Custom integrations, existing access control systems

methods.integration: QR reader module or terminal with QR support
methods.best_for: Visitor management, event ticketing, temporary access

3_passage_width_and_ada.principle: Passage width must accommodate wheelchair access where required

requirements.ada_note: Standard tripod turnstiles (550mm) do NOT meet ADA wheelchair requirements. Provide separate accessible gate alongside turnstiles.
requirements.speed_gate_ada: Some swing-gate speed gates offer 900mm+ passage width for wheelchair compliance
requirements.fire_egress: Tripod turnstile arms must drop automatically on fire alarm (EN 13637). Speed gate panels must retract. Provide emergency break-glass release.

4_throughput_calculation.principle: Number of turnstile lanes must handle peak traffic flow

formula.example: 200 people arriving in 10 minutes = 20 PPM. Tripod at 25 PPM → 1 lane sufficient. With queuing margin → 2 lanes recommended.

peak_estimation.office_building: 80% of staff arrive within 30 min → staff_count × 0.8 / 30 = PPM
peak_estimation.factory_shift_change: 100% of shift within 15 min → shift_count / 15 = PPM
peak_estimation.stadium_event: Varies widely — consult crowd management specialist

5_left_right_configuration.principle: Left/Right designation refers to which side the mechanism is on when facing entry direction

rules.single_lane: One unit is sufficient — R (right) or L (left) based on wall/barrier position
rules.dual_lane_bidirectional: Pair: 1× Right + 1× Left unit forming a single bidirectional lane
rules.multiple_lanes: Alternate R-L-R-L units. Each pair forms one lane.
rules.note: Always verify orientation on site plan before ordering. R/L designation varies by manufacturer.

6_display_module_dm55.principle: 5.5-inch display shows authentication status, user info, and instructions
features: Shows pass/deny status with color indicator
Displays user name/photo after card tap
Enhances user experience vs basic LED-only indicator
6_display_module_dm55.when_to_use: Corporate offices, visitor reception, anywhere user feedback is important. Skip for basic industrial/factory use.

7_gate_opener_selection.principle: Gate opener must match gate weight, width, and usage frequency

ds_k3gl606wx.best_for: Residential sliding gates, compound gates, light commercial
ds_k3gl606wx.requirements: 2× 12V 7Ah batteries (not included), AC power for charging

requirements: Photocell safety sensors (detect obstacle in gate path)

8_power_and_wiring.principle: Turnstiles require AC power, network, and access control wiring

typical_wiring.network: Cat5e/Cat6 Ethernet (for IP-connected models and face terminals)
typical_wiring.access_control: Wiegand (W26/W34) or RS-485 from external controller/reader
typical_wiring.fire_alarm: Dry contact from fire alarm panel to turnstile fire relay input
typical_wiring.emergency_button: Break-glass emergency release button wired to turnstile

8_power_and_wiring.conduit: Floor-embedded conduit required for power and data cables. Plan during civil works phase.
8_power_and_wiring.grounding: Metal turnstile housing must be earthed/grounded per local electrical code.

9_floor_preparation.principle: Turnstiles require level, solid floor with embedded anchor bolts

requirements.floor_type: Concrete, stone, or reinforced tile — minimum 100mm thick
requirements.leveling: Floor must be level within ±2mm across turnstile footprint
requirements.anchor_bolts: M10 or M12 chemical anchor bolts, minimum 4 per unit
requirements.cable_trench: Floor channel or conduit for power + data cables between paired units
requirements.min_clearance_sides: For paired units: exact spacing per model (typically 550mm passage + unit width)

10_compliance_standards.principle: Turnstiles and gate openers must meet safety and access standards

standards.scope: Electrically controlled exit systems for emergency evacuation — arm drop, panel retract
Industrial, commercial and garage doors and gates — safety
Safety in use of power operated doors and gates — force limitation
Safety devices for power operated gates — detection
Accessibility — wheelchair passage width, accessible alternative route
Emergency evacuation: turnstile arms must release, speed gate panels must open on fire alarm
EU machinery safety for motorized gates and turnstiles
Ingress protection for sheltered outdoor installation
